set.name: LORT-DLP
set.longname: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Dreamlit Paths

card.name: The Smokescaled Host
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Discard a card. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 7 or greater, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. III — The first spell you cast this turn costs {5} less to cast. ​

card.name: Veiled Blessings
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Dragonsong Dreamer
card.text: The first time each turn you trigger an Invoke ability, create a Dragonling token.

card.name: The Emperor's Army
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two Sand Soldier tokens. II — Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) III — Until the end of turn, creatures you control enter with +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Empire Reconstructor
card.text: Empire Reconstructor can block creatures with shadow as if it had shadow. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) When Empire Reconstructor enters, target enchantment landmark you control gets "If this enchantment would enter the graveyard, exile it, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control instead".

card.name: Sunborn Summoning
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three legendary creature cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Existential Dread
card.text: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature.

card.name: The Iron Conquest
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Choose a creature you control. Create a token copy of that creature except it has +1/+1 and ephemeral. (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.) Return a creature with the highest power among creatures in your graveyard to the battlefield, it gets ephemeral. ​

card.name: Grimm
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Grimm enters, put four -1/-1 counters on target other creature.

card.name: The Beautiful Disaster
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 5 or less. II — Target opponent loses 2 life. You gain 2 life. III — Choose a creature you control. Create a token copy of that creature except it has base power and toughness 1/1 and ephemeral. (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Kharox
card.text: Whenever a nontentacle creature you control dies, amass tentacles 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a tentacle. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black red tentacle Army creature token first.)

card.name: The Candlelit Prayer
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Shuffle a card from your hand into your library. Draw a card. Draw a card. ​

card.name: Soaring Cartographer
card.text: Brash (Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with 2 or less toughness.) When Soaring Cartographer enters, reveal a card from your hand, then choose one — • Shuffle it into your library, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a spell with mana value greater than the revealed card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. • Shuffle it into your library, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a spell with mana value less than the revealed card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Malmutation
card.text: Choose a nonlegendary creature you control. Create two tokens that are copies of it.

card.name: The Arena's Greatest
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. III — Target creature an opponent controls has "This creature can't block" until the beginning of your next upkeep. ​

card.name: Yeti Handler
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. When Yeti Handler enters, create an Enraged Yeti token.

card.name: Blighted Battleaxe
Blooming Bud
card.text: Target creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Ophelis Gardener
card.text: When Ophelis Gardener enters, target creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Sprite Mother
card.text: Whenever Sprite Mother enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature named Spritelings and each creature named Sprite Mother you control.

card.name: The Dewdrop Harvest
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create a Spritelings token. Target creature you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) Until the end of turn, creatures you control enter with +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: The Rootbound Path
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Draw a card. Until the end of turn, spells you control cost {1} less to cast. Until the end of turn, creatures you control enter with +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Spritelings LORT-DLP
card.text: Spritelings enters with two +1/+1 counters.

card.name: Lillia, The Fae Fawn
card.text: First strike Lillia enters with a +1/+1 counter. Whenever Lillia enters or deals damage, you may pay {2}, if you do, target creature you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) Whenever a creature or landmark you control enters, put a Dream counter on Lillia. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lillia has fifteen or more Dream counters, remove all Dream counters from Lillia, then transform her. Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.) --- (Back): Lillia, The Bashful Bloom

card.name: Lillia, The Bashful Bloom
card.text: First strike Whenever Lillia transforms or deals damage, you may pay {1}, if you do, target creature you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) Whenever a creature you control phases in, put a +1/+1 counter on it. --- (Front): Lillia, The Fae Fawn

card.name: Mister Root
card.text: Mister Root enters with a +1/+1 counter. When Mister Root enters, draw a card.

card.name: Petal Pixie
card.text: When Petal Pixie enters, create a Spritelings token.

card.name: Sprite Dance
card.text: Choose a creature you control. Move all counters from that creature onto target creature you control. Then recall the chosen creature. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: The Heart of the Tree
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) You gain 3 life. Create a Spritelings token. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three cards with mana value 8 or greater. Choose one and exile it, then shuffle the rest of the revealed cards into your library. For as long as it remains exiled, it has "You may cast this card from exile and it costs {X} less to cast, where X is half it's mana value, rounded down."

card.name: Steel Gale
card.text: Put two stun counters on target creature.

card.name: The Poro Parade
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with a creature type you don't control, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Put a number of +1/+1 counters on target creature you control for each unique creature type among creatures you control. Until the end of turn, creatures you control enter with +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Ultrasoft Poro
card.text: When Ultrasoft Poro enters, you gain X life where X is equal to the number of unique creature types among creatures you control.

card.name: Glacial Fell
card.text: Put a number of +0/+1 counters on target creature you control equal to its power, and a formidable counter. That creature has base power 0. (This creature assigns damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. Damage is dealt to this creature in the form of -1/-1 counters.)

card.name: Brynhir Thundersong
card.text: When Brynhir Thundersong enters, exile a creature card from your hand with a number of time counters on it equal to its mana value. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

card.name: Luminosprite
card.text: Whenever Luminosprite attacks, target other attacking creature you control gets +X/+Y where X is equal to Luminosprites power and Y is equal to Luminosprites toughness.

card.name: Incandescence
card.text: Boost all creatures. (Give all creatures another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Jarro Lightfeather
card.text: Jarro Lightfeather enters with a +1/+1 counter. When Jarro Lightfeather enters, until the end of turn, the next creature you cast enters with an additional +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Lux, Illuminated
card.text: Lux enters with a +1/+1 counter. Whenever Lux attacks, put a shield counter on Lux. Then put a +1/+1 counter on target other attacking creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) At the beginning of your post-combat main phase, if one or more creatures you control with a total of twenty or more counters among them attacked this turn, transform Lux. Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.) --- (Back): Lux, The Radiant

card.name: Lux, The Radiant
card.text: First strike Whenever Lux attacks, put a shield counter on Lux. Then put a +1/+1 counter on target other attacking creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead. --- (Front): Lux, Illuminated

card.name: Tree Sprites
card.text: Tree Sprites enters with a +1/+1 counter. When Tree Sprites enter, boost each other creature you control. (Give each other creature you control another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: The Light of Demacia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. II — Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. III — Boost each creature you control. (Give each creature you control another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Aberrant Mageseeker
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) Aberrant Mageseeker enters with a +1/+1 counter. When Aberrant Mageseeker enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.

card.name: The Petricite Hall
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile target creature an opponent controls. Target opponent creates a Suppression Curse token. Exile target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Rising Light
card.text: Boost all creatures. Repeat this process twice. (Give all creatures another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Dreamlight Alina
card.text: Dreamlight Alina enters with a +1/+1 counter. When Dreamlight Alina enters, create five Spritelings tokens. Whenever a Spritelings token you control dies, put two +1/+1 counters on a creature with the lowest power you control.

card.name: Smoldering Smirk
card.text: Boost two creatures you control. Then both creatures deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. (Give two creatures you control another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Forgotten Artifact
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Create a Sandstone Charger token. Creatures you control get challenger until end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: The Pit Champion
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) Remove all -1/-1 counters from target creature you control. Create three Gold tokens.

card.name: Mercenary Manners
card.text: Gain control of target creature with toughness 3 or less until end of turn. Untap that creature.

card.name: Eager Dedicant
card.text: Brash (Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with 2 or less toughness.) Until the end of turn, Eager Dedicant gets +1/+0 for each card you have drawn this turn.

card.name: Vex
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Vex attacks, put a -1/-1 counter on a creature with the highest power among creatures the defending player controls. Whenever a -1/-1 counter is put onto a creature an opponent controls, put a Gloom counter on Vex. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Vex has five or more Gloom counters, remove all Gloom counters from Vex, then transform her. Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.) --- (Back): Vex, The Gloomist

card.name: Vex, The Gloomist
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Vex attacks, put a -1/-1 counter on a creature with the highest power among creatures the defending player controls. If one or more -1/-1 counters would be put on a creature an opponent controls, that many plus one -1/-1 counters are put on it instead. --- (Front): Vex

card.name: Uncle Milty
card.text: Afflict 1 (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 1 life.) Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, put two +1/+1 counters on Uncle Milty.

card.name: Grotesque Gift
card.text: Grotesque Gift enters with a +1/+1 counter and a charge counter. When a creature an opponent controls enters, remove a charge counter from Grotesque Gift, if you do, put a -1/-1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Allay, The Merry
card.text: Afflict 1 (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 1 life.) When Allay enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Allay. • Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Beefcake Mayor
card.text: Afflict 1 (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 1 life.) At the beginning of your upkeep, boost Beefcake Mayor. (Give Beefcake Mayor another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Gloomsprites
card.text: Whenever Gloomsprites deals combat damage, put an afflict 1 token on it. (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 1 life.)

card.name: The Family Reunion
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature an opponent controls. Put an afflict 1 counter on target creature you control. (Whenever that creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 1 life.) Boost two creatures you control. (Give two creatures you control another ability and counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: The Wingsgiving
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Choose a creature you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with the same mana value as the chosen creature plus one. Put that creature onto the battlefield, then shuffle the chosen creature and the the rest of the revealed cards into your library. Choose a creature you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with the same mana value as the chosen creature plus two. Put that creature onto the battlefield, then shuffle the chosen creature and the the rest of the revealed cards into your library. ​

card.name: Monstrous Eruption
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets base power 5 until the beginning of your next upkeep. • Target creature you control gets base toughness 5 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Vex's Shadow
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Vex's Shadow enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a yordle creature card named Vex, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. Whenever a source you control puts a -1/-1 counter on a creature an opponent controls, put a +1/+0 counter on Vex's Shadow.

card.name: Vex's Glare
card.text: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature. Draw a card.
